title: Eslick's Server Modpack
description: What started out as a vanilla+ pack, grew into whatever this is.
body:
# Hello!

### This is what I would consider to be a enhanced vanilla pack of sorts. Well, it used to be "vanilla+" but my friends and I have gradually made this a more traditional modpack. What can I say! I just wanted to enhance the Minecraft experience to something more exciting for myself and friends. 

### Notable mod inclusions in no particular order are:

- Cobblemon
- Immersive Aircraft
- Create (with trains add-on)
- Better End & Nether
- Tectonic & Distant Horizons (complete worldgen upgrade imo)
- TONS of structure upgrades (mostly YUNG's)
- Waystones, Tempad, Custom Portals
- Backpacks (beans backpacks)
- Grappling hook
- Hephaestus (tinker's construct)
- LOADS of decoration mods
- A whole armory of armors and weapons

There's loads more, optimization and customization type mods that are mostly in the vanilla spirit (Yuushya Townscape perhaps being the furthest from vanilla with complex block models, at least compared to basic vanilla blocks), all updated to work on the latest version of sodium, as of writing this

## To anyone that finds this... Enjoy! 

Just know that I will not help you if you run into any issues running this pack, I made it for my friends and I, so I don't intend on being anyone's assistant.
